title: Bars for Days
description: A mod that allows more bars similar to the boss bar
body:
This mods adds positional boss bars similar to the ones in vanilla. The positional boss bars can be set using the /barsfordays commands, the syntax's are identical to vanilla's /bossbar commands.

This mod is meant to be used with mods like CCI to allow for positional boss bars for stream integrations and such.


This mod does NOT override vanilla's boss bars. The boss bars provided by Bars for Days are separate.
